title: GitDiff
description: The result of a read-only `git diff` inspection.

GitDiffFile.description: The per-file portion of a diff result.

is_binary.description: True when git reported this file as binary; `hunks` is then empty.

orig_path.description: The source path for a rename; `None` otherwise.

path.description: Workspace-relative path (the destination path for a rename).

GitDiffHunk.description:
One contiguous hunk of a unified diff for a single file.

`old_start`/`old_lines` index the pre-image; `new_start`/`new_lines` index the post-image. Line numbers are 1-based, matching unified-diff conventions.

lines.description: The hunk body lines, each prefixed with ` ` (context), `+` (added), or `-` (removed). Context lines are retained so the hunk can be rendered.
